## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## ROS 2 Environment
- OS: (e.g., Ubuntu 22.04)
- ROS 2 Distro: (e.g., Humble, Iron, Jazzy)
- Installation type: (e.g., apt, source)

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Run command '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Agent Used
Which agent were you using when the issue occurred?
- [ ] ros2-orchestrator
- [ ] urdf-validator
- [ ] nav2-agent
- [ ] ros2-control-agent
- [ ] Other: ___________

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here (logs, screenshots, etc.).
